arts.ttl: Preview: Swindon Town vs. Port Vale - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League Two clash between Swindon Town and Port Vale, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Swindon's 5-1 win over Carlisle last weekend was their fourth straight win in the league and makes it just two defeats in their last 12 games. Port Vale's 4-1 defeat to Wrexham in the EFL Trophy ende...
